name: 衝突高潮前置開場
description: 以最具視覺衝擊力的鞭刑場景開場，觀眾立刻被極端的肢體暴力和情感張力抓住，急切想知道為什麼丈夫會鞭打妻子、事情如何走到這一步。這種先果後因的手法製造了強烈的懸念。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Keep going. Just say it. Just say it, please. For the love of God, just say it and I can stop. You believe everyone but your own wife. For once, could you choose me?
